'''Orellon II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], covered in [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]], plains and [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]]. Thirty-five point nine percent of the planet's surface was covered with [[Water/Legends|water]].<ref name="AJ2" />

[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Michael Tandre]] accidentally discovered the planet, when he crashed on Orellon II over two hundred years before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The native [[Species/Legends|species]], known as the [[Kentra]], would go on to create an entire religion based on the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] teachings.
